Afficher des lettres au lieu des numéros: Display letters instead of page numbers
Ajoutez au moins une image de page pour: Add at least one page image to view the book
Assurez-vous que le document ait une tai: Make sure the document is 50 MB maximum.
Aucune suggestion car cette entrée n'est: No suggestion because this entry is not a story nor a cover.
Cette histoire fait généralement {origin: This story usually has {originalPagesCount} pages but the entry in your index contains {entryPagesCount} pages.
Cette indexation n'existe pas ou apparti: This indexation doesn't exist or belongs to another user.
Combien de pages le magazine contient-il: How many pages does the magazine contain? (including pages you don't want to index)
Dumili a trouvé des couvertures existant: Dumili found existing covers that look like yours. Select the cover that looks most like yours.
Dumili n'est pas actif actuellement :-(: Dumili is not active at the moment :-(
Étendre cette entrée à {originalPagesCou: Extend this entry to {originalPagesCount} page|Extend this entry to {originalPagesCount} pages
Il n'y a pas assez de pages disponibles: There are not enough pages available after this entry to adjust the number of pages ({extraPagesNeeded} extra pages needed).
La couverture ne devrait faire qu'une pa: The cover should be only one page
La première page est généralement une pa: The first page is usually a cover page
Le type d'entrée de cette page ne peut p: The type of the entry of this page can't be detected because no image is associated with it
Le type d'entrée ne peut pas être détect: The type of the entry can't be detected because no image is associated with its first page
Le type de l'histoire sélectionnée ne co: The type of the selected story doesn't correspond to the entry type
Les images envoyées seront associées aux: The uploaded images will be associated with pages from page number {firstPage}.
Non calculé car la première page de l'en: Not calculated because the first page of the entry has no image
Réduire cette entrée à {originalPagesCou: Shrink this entry to {originalPagesCount} page|Shrink this entry to {originalPagesCount} pages
Résultats OCR pour la première case: OCR results for the first page
Si aucune ne ressemble,cliquez sur \"Ann: If none of them match, click "Cancel".
Si votre document fait plus de {maxPages: If your document has more than {maxPages} page(s), pages {firstOutOfRangePageNumber} and further will be ignored.
If your document has more than {maxPages} page(s), pages {firstOutOfRangePageNumber} and further will be overwritten.
Si vous envoyez plus de {maxPages} fichi: If you send more than {maxPages} image file(s), pages {firstOutOfRangePageNumber} and further will be ignored.
If you send more than {maxPages} image file(s), pages {firstOutOfRangePageNumber} and further will be overwritten.
Toutes les entrées doivent avoir un type: All entries need to have a story kind. The entry at page {entry} doesn't have a type.
All entries need to have a story kind. A sub-entry at page {entry} doesn't have a type.
Voulez-vous vraiment supprimer cette ent: Do you really want to delete this entry?
Vous aurez la possibilité de rogner les: You will be able to crop the images before sending them.
Vous avez indiqué toutes les entrées de: Have you filled all the entries of this indexation? Click the button below to preview the indexation on Inducks. You will be able to preview the indexation before submitting it.
Vous devez être connecté pour accéder à: You must be logged in to access this page.
Vous devez identifier au moins une histo: You must identify at least one story to continue
Vous devez indiquer les caractéristiques:
You must specify the characteristics of the issue
before being able to modify some of its metadata.
Vous devez spécifier une publication et: You must specify a publication and an issue number to continue (click on the dropdown that currently says "Unknown issue")
Vous devez spécifier la date de sortie d: You must specify the release date of the issue in "Metadata" to continue
Vous êtes sur le point de supprimer les: You are about to delete the last {numberOfPagesToDelete} pages of the indexation. Are you sure?
